Package dev.yanianz.star.data.persistent

package dev.yanianz.star.data.persistent
This package provides some utilities like the PersistentDataAPI, this api allows you to interact with PersistentDataContainers. We also provide a few PersistentDataType implementations ourselves.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    dev.yanianz.star.data
    This package contains some data-related classes.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    PersistentDataAPI
    This is a utility class that allows you to modify data for any Objects that implement PersistentDataHolder.
    PersistentJsonDataType<T extends com.google.gson.JsonElement>
     
    PersistentUUIDDataType
    A PersistentDataType for UUIDs which uses an Integer array for storage purposes.
    PersistentYAMLDataType
